name: DecisionAssure
allowed_use_boundary: Use only as artifact-package-required intake evidence.
Do not treat as sourced until an authorized package or public source is recorded.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: DecisionAssure is a candidate trace integrity and causal-continuity intake target.
Supplied traces may be evaluated for independent authority reconstruction.
non_claims: DecisionAssure as a whole is not validated.
No SPE or StegVerse certification is implied.
Trace evidence does not become execution authority.

transition_table_mapping.claims: trace integrity, causal-continuity, drift, corruption, verifier-output review
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no general validation, certification, endorsement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.evidence_model: trace records, policy references, delegation references, hashes, verifier outputs
transition_table_mapping.policy_or_rule_model: artifact-specific source sufficiency and commit-time standing boundary
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: blocked until artifact package supports independent reconstruction
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: trace may support SPE review but cannot replace it
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: trace, drift, corruption, and fail-closed behavior comparison
transition_table_mapping.fail_closed_conditions: artifact package missing, independent reconstruction unsupported, or authority overclaim

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
